---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Active research and methodological development"
listing:
  - id: families
    contents:
      - projects/*/index.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [title, subtitle, description, image, categories]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

A short tour of the projects I currently lead or contribute to, spanning
cardiovascular AI, multi-omics, radiomics, perioperative risk, and
methodological development for clinical prediction.

Each project family below collects related sub-analyses — empirical work,
methods development, and software — under a single scientific question.
Click any card for the full write-up and sub-pages.

::: {#families}
:::
